title: RahfiPack
body:
## Content
![Landscape with a meteor crater dividing land and sea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pU2GPf9G/images/4def38c25d5af52fcbbe62b072189e6d2bd98102.png)
RahfiPack is a modpack bringing you everything from new biomes and dimensions to explore to bosses to fight. It also includes technological mods like [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)(and a bunch of addons for it), letting you eventually automate yourself out of playing the game entirely and [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), which lets you explore other planets.

## Performance
![A lighthouse on a lonely island, castle in the distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pU2GPf9G/images/a1c11671af36741c8adebc1b395827a05ec89645.png)
We've included lots of mods making the experience a bit less demanding but we do still recommend at least 6GB of ram if you're planning on playing on a server or closer to 8GB if you're more of a solo player.

If you happen to have a beefy PC we've included two versions of the Complementary Shaders for you to use. [Complementary - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), a shader that tries to improve on Minecraft's looks without differing too much from the original style and [Complementary - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound), which does the same only without limiting itself to the style of the vanilla game.

This modpack is still in its early stages so expect that mods may be added or removed at some point
